Kadir Has University

Mechatronics Engineering

Kadir Has University Mechatronics Engineering Department trains engineers specialised in areas such as robotics, automation and sensor technologies by combining the fields of machinery, electronics and software. The department, which provides education in English, offers hands-on experience through project-based learning and industry collaborations. Students develop their competences through real engineering projects.
